note: Compositing head pred=alpha*F+(1-alpha)*I_t to remove delta-head cyan ghosts. loss=composite, step=20, K=6, 8000 steps.
bug_found_and_fixed: CompositePixelDecoder isn't a PixelDecoder subclass -> cf_contrastive took the latent branch and crashed (cat 5D frame vs 3D latents). Fixed: route by hasattr(head,'delta').

0.5.outcome: collapse: copies I_t (alpha->0), agent never moves

0.1.outcome: distinct correct moves, NO cyan ghosts, distractors mostly preserved

verdict: composite trades ~0.12 NMI for a cleaner background; delta head remains higher-NMI. Blobby agent (coarse decoder) is the shared fidelity ceiling.
